---
title: "Research"
---

::: {#publications-app}
<p>Loading publications…</p>
:::

<script>
const AUTHOR_ID = "2333978217";
const MY_NAME = "F\u00e9lix Boudry"; // must match the name in Semantic Scholar author lists

function escapeHtml(s) {
  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.textContent = s;
  return div.innerHTML;
}

function readableList(names) {
  if (names.length < 3) return names.join(" and ");
  const last = names[names.length - 1];
  const rest = names.slice(0, -1);
  return `${rest.join(", ")}, and ${last}`;
}

function button(url, text, iconClass) {
  if (!url) return "";
  const icon = iconClass ? `<i class="${iconClass}"></i> ` : "";
  return (
    `<a href="${escapeHtml(url)}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary me-2" ` +
    `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${icon}${escapeHtml(text)}</a>`
  );
}

function paperToEntry(paper) {
  const authors = (paper.authors || []).map((a) =>
    a.name && a.name.includes("Boudry") ? "<strong>Félix Boudry</strong>" : a.name
  );
  const authorStr = readableList(authors.length ? authors : ["me"]);
  const yearStr = String(paper.year || "n.d.");
  const title = paper.title || "Untitled";
  const venue = paper.venue;
  const externalIds = paper.externalIds || {};

  const buttons = [];
  if (externalIds.ArXiv) {
    buttons.push(button(`https://arxiv.org/abs/${externalIds.ArXiv}`, "Preprint", "bi-file-earmark-pdf"));
  }
  const openAccessUrl = paper.openAccessPdf && paper.openAccessPdf.url;
  if (openAccessUrl) {
    buttons.push(button(openAccessUrl, "PDF", "bi-file-earmark-pdf"));
  }

  let pubStr = `${authorStr}. (${yearStr}) "${escapeHtml(title)}."`;
  if (venue) pubStr += ` <em>${escapeHtml(venue)}</em>`;

  const pubUrl = externalIds.DOI ? `https://doi.org/${externalIds.DOI}` : null;
  const isWorkingPaper = !pubUrl;

  if (!isWorkingPaper) {
    buttons.push(button(pubUrl, "Published", "ai-archive"));
  }

  return {
    year: yearStr,
    isWorkingPaper,
    html: `<li class="list-group-item">${pubStr}<br>${buttons.join(" ")}</li>`,
  };
}

async function fetchPapers() {
  const fields = "paperId,title,authors,year,venue,publicationDate,externalIds,openAccessPdf,url";
  const url = `https://api.semanticscholar.org/graph/v1/author/${AUTHOR_ID}/papers?fields=${fields}&limit=1000`;
  const res = await fetch(url);
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Semantic Scholar API error: ${res.status}`);
  const data = await res.json();
  return data.data || [];
}

function renderSection(title, entriesByYear) {
  const years = Object.keys(entriesByYear).sort((a, b) => b.localeCompare(a));
  if (years.length === 0) return "";
  let html = `<h2>${title}</h2>`;
  for (const year of years) {
    html += `<h3 id="${title.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, "-")}-${year}">${year}</h3>`;
    html += `<ul class="list-group list-group-flush">${entriesByYear[year].join("\n")}</ul>`;
  }
  return html;
}

(async function main() {
  const container = document.getElementById("publications-app");
  try {
    const papers = await fetchPapers();
    const pubs = {};
    const wps = {};

    for (const paper of papers) {
      const entry = paperToEntry(paper);
      const bucket = entry.isWorkingPaper ? wps : pubs;
      if (!bucket[entry.year]) bucket[entry.year] = [];
      bucket[entry.year].push(entry.html);
    }

    container.innerHTML =
      renderSection("Published", pubs) +
      renderSection("Working Papers / Non-archival", wps);
  } catch (err) {
    container.innerHTML = `<p class="text-danger">Failed to load publications: ${escapeHtml(err.message)}</p>`;
    console.error(err);
  }
})();
</script>
